title: Router and message handler for transmitting control messages over alternative communications channel
abstract: Apparatus in a network for routing instructions for remotely controlling a plurality of nodes in a network is provided comprising a communication interface for receiving a request, comprising instructions for controlling a number of nodes of the plurality of nodes, and for communicating with a plurality of network capabilities for forwarding instructions for the plurality of nodes, the plurality of network capabilities comprising at least two network capabilities configured to use different communication media for forwarding instructions; and a message processing module for determining a transmission plan for selectively transmitting the instructions from the request to one or more network capabilities of the at least two network capabilities for forwarding the instructions to the plurality of nodes, generating one or more messages for the instructions in the request, and causing the one or more messages to be sent via the communication interface, according to the transmission plan, to the one or more network capabilities.
claims:
Claims 1 . Apparatus in a network for routing instructions for remotely controlling a plurality of nodes in a network, the apparatus comprising: a communication interface for receiving a request, comprising instructions for controlling a number of nodes of the plurality of nodes, and for communicating with a plurality of network capabilities for forwarding instructions for the plurality of nodes, the plurality of network capabilities comprising at least two network capabilities configured to use different communication media for forwarding instructions; and a message processing module for determining a transmission plan for selectively transmitting the instructions from the request to one or more network capabilities of the plurality of network capabilities, generating one or more messages for the instructions from the request, and causing the one or more messages to be sent via the communication interface, according to the transmission plan, to the one or more network capabilities. 2. Apparatus according to claim 1 , wherein the at least two network capabilities are configured to communicate with one or more message handlers for controlling the number of nodes and the message processing module is operable to select one or more of the at least two network capabilities for forwarding the instructions to the one or more message handlers. 3. Apparatus according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the one or more network capabilities include two network capabilities and the message processing module is operable to cause the one or more messages to be sent simultaneously to the two network capabilities in accordance with the transmission plan. 4. Apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the different communication media includes at least two out of a digital audio broadcast DAB, frequency modulation FM, short message service SMS cell and a sub MHz radio signal broadcast channel. 5. Apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein the message processing module is operable to analyse network capability status updates received via the communication interface from the plurality of network capabilities. 6. Apparatus according to claim 5, wherein a network capability status update of the network capability status updates comprises at least one out of one or more regions supported by the network capability, speed of transmission per the one or more regions and a maximum message payload size for messages to be transmitted by the network capability. 7. Apparatus according to claim 5 or 6, wherein the request comprises a target location and a delivery time criticality parameter and the message processing module is configured to determine the transmission plan based on at least one out of the target location, the delivery time criticality parameter and information in received network capability status updates. 8. Apparatus according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the request also comprises an indication of the time-criticality of the instructions and the message processing module is configured to determine the transmission plan based on the time-criticality of the instructions. 9. Apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 7, wherein the message processing module is further operable to analyse a receipt, associated with the instructions, received via the communication interface in a communication channel independent of the plurality of network capabilities. 10. Apparatus according to claim 9, wherein the one or more messages comprise one or more first messages and the message processing module is configured to resend the one or more first messages, or send one or more second messages associated with the instructions, at a later time, according to the transmission plan, if a number of received receipts associated with the instructions is lower than a threshold number of receipts. 1 1 . Apparatus according to claim 10, wherein the message processing module is operable to generate an immediate send list, comprising at least one 

 network capability to which the one or more messages will be sent for broadcast at a first time, and a deferred send list, comprising at least one network capability to which the one or more first messages or the one or more second messages will be sent at a second time, later than the first time, if the number of received receipts associated with the instructions is lower than the threshold number of receipts. 12. Apparatus according to claim 1 1 , wherein the message processing module is configured to determine the immediate send list and the deferred send list based on at least one out of the network capability status updates, the target location and the delivery time criticality parameter. 13. Apparatus according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the message processing module includes a message identifier in the one or more messages. 14. Apparatus according to claim 13, wherein the message processing module is operable to divide the instructions from the request into a plurality of segments, wherein the one or more messages comprises one message for each segment and each message comprises a message identifier, identifying the instructions and the number of the segment making up the instructions. 15. Apparatus according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the message processing module is operable to include a target class parameter in the message, the target class parameter including at least one out of an owner, type and category of the plurality of nodes. 16. Apparatus according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the plurality of nodes comprises at least one out of a utility meter, heater, generator and charger. 17. Apparatus according to any one of the preceding claims comprising one or more servers comprising one or more processing units operable to execute instructions in one or more memory units in the server and the message processing module comprises the one or more processing units and the one or more memory units. 18. Message handler apparatus in a network for controlling one or more of a plurality of nodes in the network according to instructions received by the message handler apparatus, the message handler apparatus comprising: a plurality of communication interfaces for receiving messages with instructions from a plurality of network capabilities and interfacing with the one or more nodes to carry out the instructions on the nodes; and a processor for processing information in the messages and controlling the plurality of communication interfaces, wherein the plurality of communication interfaces are configured to receive messages with instructions over at least two different types of communication media. 19. Message handler apparatus according to claim 18, wherein the at least two different types of communication media comprise at least two out of a DAB, an FM, an SMS cell and a sub-MHz radio signal broadcast channel. 20. Message handler apparatus according to claim 18, wherein the plurality of communication interfaces comprise at least one out of a DAB/FM chip and a cellular chip. 21 . Message handler apparatus according to claim 18, 19 or 20, wherein the processor is further operable to generate a receipt in response to receiving a message via the plurality of communication interfaces and to control an interface of the plurality of interfaces to send the receipt. 22. Message handler apparatus according to claim 21 , wherein the message comprises an indication of a receipt time window during which a receipt is required and the processor is operable to control the interface to send the receipt within the receipt time window. 23. Message handler apparatus according to claim 21 or 22, wherein the message is received at the message handler from a router for routing the instructions via one of the plurality of network capabilities and the processor is operable to control a communication interface of the plurality of communication interfaces to transmit the receipt to the router at an address indicated in the message. 24. Message handler apparatus according to any one of claims 21 to 23, wherein the message comprises an indication of a receipt scaling factor and the processor is configured to generate a random number and only send a receipt if the random number is smaller or equal to the receipt scaling factor. 25. Message handler apparatus according to any one of claims 18 to 24, wherein each of the messages comprise a message identifier and the processor is configured to determine, using the message identifier, whether the message has already been received. 26. Message handler apparatus according to any one of claims 18 to 25, wherein a message of the messages comprises a target class parameter, indicating at least one out of an owner, type and category of a node, the message handler apparatus further comprising a memory storing at least one out of owner information, type information or category information about the one or more nodes, and the processor is configured to determine whether the message is relevant for the one or more nodes based on a comparison of the target class parameter and the information in the memory. 27. Message handler apparatus according to any one of claims 18 to 26, wherein the one or more nodes comprise at least one out of a utility meter, heater, generator and charger. 28. Message handler apparatus according to any one of claims 18 to 27, wherein the processor is further operable to turn on, switch off or adjust at least one of the one or more nodes in accordance with the instructions received in the message. 29. A system comprising router apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 17 and a message handler apparatus according to any one of claims 18 to 28. 30. A method of routing instructions for remotely controlling a plurality of nodes in a network, the method comprising: analysing a received request with instructions for controlling a plurality of nodes in the network; 

 selecting a network capability, for forwarding the instructions for controlling the plurality of nodes, out of a plurality of network capabilities for forwarding instructions, at least two of the network capabilities being arranged to forward instructions using different communication media; generating one or more messages associated with the instructions; and causing the one or more messages to be sent to the selected network capability. 31 . A method according to claim 30, wherein selecting a network capability comprises selecting a network capability out of at least two network capabilities each operable to transmit instructions using a different communication medium to a message handler for controlling one or more of the plurality of nodes. 32. A method according to claim 31 , wherein selecting a network capability comprises selecting a first network capability and the method further comprises selecting a second network capability out of the at least two network capabilities and causing the one or more messages or one or more other messages associated with the instructions to be sent to both the first and the second network capabilities. 33. A method according to claim 30, 31 or 32, wherein the two network capabilities are configured to transmit messages over at least two out of DAB, FM, SMS cell and a sub MHz radio signal broadcast channel. 34. A method according to any one of claims 30 to 33, further comprising analysing network capability status updates received from the plurality of network capabilities. 35. A method according to claim 34, wherein the request comprises a target location and a delivery time criticality parameter and selecting the network capability comprises selecting the network capability based on at least one out of the target location, the delivery time criticality parameter and information in received network capability status updates. 36. A method according to claim 34 or 35, further comprising analysing a receipt, associated with the instructions, received via the communication interface. 37. A method according to claim 34, 35 or 36, wherein the one or more messages comprise one or more first messages and the method further comprises causing the one or more first messages to be resent, or causing one or more second messages associated with the instructions to be sent, at a later time if a number of received receipts associated with the instructions is lower than a threshold number of receipts. 38. A method according to any one of claims 34 to 37, further comprising generating an immediate send list, comprising at least one network capability to which the one or more messages will be sent for broadcast at a first time, and a deferred send list, comprising at least one network capability to which one or more messages associated with the instructions will be sent at a second time, later than the first time, if the number of received receipts associated with the instructions is lower than the threshold number of receipts. 39. A method according to claim 38, wherein generating an immediate send list and a deferred send list comprises generating the immediate send list and the deferred send list based on at least one out of the network capability status updates, the target location and the delivery time criticality parameter. 40. A method according to any one of claims 30 to 39, further comprising including a message identifier in each of the one or more messages. 41 . A method according to claim 40, wherein the one or more messages comprises a plurality of messages and the method further comprising dividing the instructions into a plurality of segments and including a segment of the plurality of segments in each of the plurality of messages, the message identifier including an identifier for the instructions and an identifier for the segment. 42. A method in a message handler of controlling one or more of a plurality of nodes in a network according to instructions received in a message, comprising processing messages received over at least two different communication media from network capabilities for transmitting messages with instructions for controlling a plurality of nodes; and 

 causing the one or more nodes of the plurality of nodes to be controlled according to the instructions. 43. A method according to claim 42, wherein the at least two different communication media comprises at least two out of a DAB, an FM, an SMS cell and a sub-MHz radio signal broadcast channel. 44. A method according to claim 42 or 43, wherein the instructions are received from a router via a network capability of the network capabilities and the method further comprises generating a receipt in response to the message and causing the receipt to be sent to the router in a communication channel independent of the network capability. 45. A method according to claim 44, wherein the message comprises an indication of a receipt time window during which a receipt is required and wherein causing the receipt to be sent comprises causing the receipt to be sent within the receipt time window. 46. A method according to claim 44 or 45, wherein the message comprises an indication of a receipt scaling factor, and wherein generating the receipt comprises generating the receipt if a random number is smaller or equal to the receipt scaling factor. 47. A method according to any one of claims 42 to 46, wherein the message comprises a message identifier and the method comprises determining, using the message identifier, whether the message has already been received. 48. A computer program comprising instructions that when executed by one or more processors cause the one or more processors to carry out a method according to any one of claims 31 to 47. 49. Apparatus in a network for routing instructions for remotely controlling a plurality of nodes in a network, the apparatus comprising: at least one processor; and a computer-readable medium coupled to the at least one processor having 

 instructions stored thereon which, when executed by the at least one processor, causes the at least one processor to: analyse a received request with instructions for controlling a plurality of nodes in the network; select a network capability, for forwarding the instructions for controlling the plurality of nodes, out of a plurality of network capabilities for forwarding instructions, at least two of the network capabilities being arranged to forward instructions using different communication media; generate one or more messages for the instructions; and cause the one or more messages to be sent to the selected network capability. 50. Apparatus in a network for controlling one or more of a plurality of nodes in a network according to instructions received in a message, the apparatus comprising: at least one processor; and a computer-readable medium coupled to the at least one processor having instructions stored thereon which, when executed by the at least one processor, causes the at least one processor to: process messages received over at least two different communication media from network capabilities for transmitting messages with instructions for controlling a plurality of nodes; and causing the one or more nodes of the plurality of nodes to be controlled according to the instructions. 51 . Apparatus in a network for controlling one or more of a plurality of nodes in the network according to received instructions, the message handler comprising: a communication interface for receiving messages, comprising instructions for controlling nodes, from one or more network capabilities and for interfacing with the one or more nodes to carry out the instructions on the one or more nodes; and a processor configured to process the messages and control the plurality of communication interfaces, wherein the communication interface comprises a receiver configured to receive the messages over a broadcast comprising a digital 

 audio broadcasting DAB, frequency modulation FM or short message service SMS cell broadcast. 52. A message handler according to claim 51 , wherein the processor is configured to control the communication interface to monitor a DAB, FM or SMS cell broadcast channel, to detect a value indicating a control message in the broadcast and in response to detecting it, finding and extracting the control message. 53. Apparatus in a network for routing instructions for remotely controlling a plurality of nodes in a network, the apparatus comprising: a communication interface configured to receive a request, comprising instructions for controlling a number of nodes of the plurality of nodes, and to communicate with one or more network capabilities for forwarding instructions to one or more message handlers for controlling said number of nodes; and a message processing module configured to generate one or more messages for the instructions and cause the one or more messages to be sent via the communication interface to the one or more network capabilities, wherein the one or more network capabilities comprises one or more network capabilities configured to broadcast messages to the one or more message handlers in one out of a DAB, FM and SMS cell broadcast channel. 54. An apparatus as substantially hereinbefore described with reference to the accompanying drawings. 55. A method as substantially hereinbefore described with reference to the accompanying drawings. 56. A computer program as substantially hereinbefore described with reference to the accompanying drawings.
